title: Heat pump consumed ~60% more than usual
detail: Sustained elevated heat-pump electricity use over 8 days, beyond what outdoor temperature explains. Possible defrost fault, low refrigerant, or thermostat misconfiguration.
suggested_action: Check heat pump settings / book a service inspection.

title: Cheapest power is around 13:00
detail: Over the year the lowest average price was at 13:00 (~EUR 0.324/kWh). Shift flexible loads (EV, dishwasher, laundry) into this window.
suggested_action: Schedule EV charging and appliances overnight.

title: Highest bill in 2026-01
detail: 2026-01 cost EUR 666.99 vs your low of EUR -6.01 in 2026-07, driven by heating demand and lower solar.
suggested_action: Pre-heat during cheap/sunny hours; review winter heating schedule.
